free_text: Levels in 60-Nd-146 populated by the (n,n'g) reaction
Fast neutrons filtered from thermal neutrons and
gamma-rays by Cd (0.5 mm), B4C (1 cm) and depleted
A system of collimators was used to obtain a beam
diameter of about 4 cm on the target.
At 1.5 MeV neutron spectrum falls off according to the
Nd2O3 enriched to 97.4% in 146Nd (10 g, 43x34x3 mm3)
with its front face making an angle of 30 deg with
40 cm3 coaxial Ge(Li) detector with 3 keV FWHM
for 1332 keV gamma rays, placed 40 cm from target
